trueend_loot.title: Find and loot a unique structure in Beyond the Dream

trueend_survive.title: Survive the True End — defeat or evade its unique hostile inhabitants

subtitle.text: Everything you thought was the end was a threshold. The dreaming goes deeper than you planned.

description: Beyond the Dream has structures that do not follow standard dungeon rules.
They are older than the End Cities.
They are possibly older than the central island.
The hostile mobs here are unique to the dimension.
They do not drop conventional loot.
What they drop is worth the expedition.
This is the last true frontier before Ch14.
Ch14 is about what the void remembers — the accumulated meaning of everything.
To understand what the void remembers, you must first have traveled far enough into it
→ Loot a unique True End structure [check]
